title: Football Superstar Splatter Illustration Poster AI
sourceTitle: Football Superstar Splatter Illustration Poster AI Prompt

imagePrompts.prompt: Theme: Ultra-detailed sports illustration poster featuring fictional forward controlling the ball, intense expression, side-profile hero face dominating the poster. Subject: fictional forward controlling the ball, intense expression, side-profile hero face dominating the poster combines a giant side-profile portrait with a full-body football action pose in the foreground, creating a dynamic superstar composition with sharp facial detail and match-day intensity. Scene: Ultra-detailed sports illustration poster, dynamic football superstar composition, giant side-profile portrait dominating the left side, full-body action pose in the supplies the abstract national-color or team-color field, explosive paint splashes, ink strokes, dramatic energy trails, and symbolic spirit motif behind the player. Composition: Fixed high-impact poster composition: giant side-profile portrait dominates the left side, full-body action figure controls or strikes the ball in the foreground, white background holds colorful splatter explosions, and title typography anchors the design. Signature Elements: Giant side-profile portrait, foreground football action pose, clear football, explosive paint splashes, ink strokes, symbolic spirit motif, dramatic energy trails, colorful white-background composition, and premium collectible sports finish. Style: Ultra-detailed sports fantasy concept art with expressive brushwork, watercolor and graffiti effects, manga-inspired realism, cinematic lighting, premium collectible artwork finish, ArtStation-trending sharpness, and 8K-level detail. Color Palette: Bright white base with national or team-color splatter explosions, saturated watercolor accents, ink-black strokes, jersey-color emphasis, and high-contrast sports campaign energy. Lighting: Cinematic sports-poster lighting with sharp facial highlights, dynamic rim light, ball and jersey clarity, glowing energy trails, and explosive paint contrast against the white background. Camera: Poster-style composite camera with giant left-side profile portrait, foreground full-body action figure, clear ball visibility, sharp facial focus, and balanced typography space. Typography: GLORY / FINAL RUN appears as player name, campaign word, jersey number, or short slogan, integrated with the splatter composition and readable at poster scale. Restrictions: Clean focused visual treatment with coherent detail and source-consistent structure.

promptTranslations.zh:
使用以下英文图像生成提示词；保留可见文字、品牌名、变量值和参数为英文。
